Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) 
Respiratory Illnesses 
Digital Media 
Dec. 22, 2025 
What to know 
These videos and public service announcements share information about respiratory illnesses and the importance of taking action to help protect yourself and your community. 
We encourage you to share these with the communities you serve. 
Videos 
Video: You're My Everything 
The importance of taking action to help protect yourself, your family and your community 
Video: Stay Well This Season 
Prevention strategies people can use to protect themselves from respiratory illnesses 
Video: Sick? Take Precautions 
Steps people can take when they are sick to help keep from spreading respiratory illnesses to others 
Public service announcements (PSA) 
PSA: Everyday Actions 
Prevention strategies people can use to protect themselves from respiratory illnesses

PSA: If You're Higher Risk 
Who might be at higher risk for severe respiratory illnesses and how they can protect themselves
